item.title: O que é e para o que serve arquitetura monolítica？ | O que é e para o que serve arquitetura monolítica?
item.description:
加布里埃尔·J

发表于 3 月 1 日

一个整体架构和软件开发模型，作为功能集成在 um unico applicativo，geralmente com uma única base de código e um único processo de implantação。 一旦暂停，gabrielgcj 将无法发表评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被解除。

解除暂停后，gabrielgcj 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，gabrielgcj 的所有帖子都将隐藏起来，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 gabrielgcj 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

笔记：

感谢您维护 DEV 社区的安全。 以下是标记 gabrielgcj 的方法：

降低 gabrielgcj 的所有帖子的可见度

报告其他不当行为

取消标记 gabrielgcj 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

Gabriel J

Posted on Mar 1

   

A arquitetura monolítica é um modelo de desenvolvimento de software em que todas as funcionalidades são integradas em um único aplicativo, geralmente com uma única base de código e um único processo de implantação. Normalmente é usada no backend, onde o servidor é responsável por gerenciar as solicitações e fornecer as respostas.

O objetivo principal da arquitetura monolítica é simplificar o desenvolvimento de aplicativos e torná-lo mais fácil de gerenciar. Como todos os componentes estão em um único lugar, os desenvolvedores têm mais controle sobre o código e podem fazer alterações mais facilmente. Além disso, a arquitetura monolítica pode ser mais fácil de testar, implantar e escalar.

Uma das principais vantagens da arquitetura monolítica é que ela é simples e fácil de entender. Não há necessidade de aprender várias tecnologias e plataformas para desenvolver um aplicativo monolítico. Além disso, é mais fácil encontrar desenvolvedores que saibam trabalhar com essa arquitetura, já que é muito comum em empresas de diversos setores.

Outra vantagem da arquitetura monolítica é que ela é altamente escalável. Como todo o aplicativo é executado em um único processo, é fácil aumentar o número de recursos do servidor para lidar com um maior número de solicitações. Além disso, a maioria dos provedores de hospedagem oferecem suporte a essa arquitetura e podem fornecer soluções para aumentar a capacidade de processamento e memória.

No entanto, a arquitetura monolítica pode ter algumas desvantagens. Uma delas é que pode ser difícil manter o código organizado e escalável à medida que o aplicativo cresce. Além disso, pode ser difícil adicionar novas funcionalidades sem afetar o restante do código. Isso pode levar a problemas de dependência e dificuldades para manter o aplicativo atualizado com as últimas tecnologias.

Resumindo, a arquitetura monolítica é um modelo simples e eficiente para o desenvolvimento de aplicativos backend. É fácil de entender, escalar e gerenciar, e pode ser uma boa opção para projetos menores. No entanto, é importante avaliar as necessidades do projeto antes de escolher uma arquitetura de desenvolvimento, e considerar outras opções, como arquiteturas distribuídas e microsserviços, que podem ser mais adequadas para projetos maiores e complexos.

item.title: 终极博客网站入门工具包 | Ultimate blog website starter kit
item.description:
假设您有一个包含应用程序和用于将应用程序连接到数据库的仪表板/后端的全栈存储库。

我的意思是一个完整的全栈存储库来开发可扩展的产品。

您只需要克隆存储库并运行几个命令，您的成熟产品就已准备就绪。

让我用下面添加的图表来解释。 这就是存储库的作用

应用程序是网站的前端部分，管理是网站的后端部分。

用户流程中解释了您究竟需要做什么。 您只需克隆存储库运行几个命令，打开管理写入页面并推送内容，您的博客网站内容就可以部署了。

这是整个存储库。

  • 在一处管理您的内容
  • 在一处管理网站的用户界面
  • 在一处管理订阅者和业务

单击此处获取存储库

这个存储库是什么？

这是一个博客入门工具包或博客入门全栈存储库，可帮助开发人员创建和管理他们的内容网站，包括后端和前端。

该存储库包含位于网站前端的应用程序和位于网站后端的管理员。

存储库中的 Application 和 Admin 是什么？

应用程序是网站的外观，管理是开发人员管理网站内容的地方。

管理部分包括以下内容 -

  • 博客页面编辑/删除并列出数据库中的所有文章（Firebase）
  • 写一个页面，包含一个Editor，用来写博客，保存在数据库中

如何使用存储库？

  • 克隆存储库
  • 在next.config.js文件中添加 Firebase 数据库配置，您将从Firebase 控制台获取 firebase 配置。
  • 运行 yarn 和 yarn run dev 命令
  • 打开localhost:3001/admin/write写博客
  • 通过添加横幅图片发布博客
  • 部署网站

您的内容网站已准备就绪。

为什么这个存储库？

创建一个博客网站不是那么容易，你将如何扩展也是一个任务，比如如何写内容，如何保存内容等等。

很多事情都需要注意，这个存储库将解决这个问题。

立即准备好您的博客网站，并将其部署到您自己的域中。

其他无代码工具都没有为您提供代码库或对您自己网站的完全控制，而这个存储库做到了这一点。

您将在存储库中得到什么？

  • 您自己的博客网站的完整堆栈存储库
  • 用于撰写和管理文章的管理面板
  • 使用管理面板管理订阅者并增加您的受众

如何更改网站的用户界面

目前根目录下的components文件夹包含主页和博客路由。
如果您想更改主页和博客页面的 UI，只需转到它们各自的 index.jsx 页面并进行相应的编辑。

建筑学

  • 组件包含路由页面
  • 页面包含路线
  • 模块包含重用代码库，如 Navbar、Body 和 Subscribe

技术栈

  • 下一个
  • 反应JS
  • 顺风 CSS
  • 后端如何连接到前端？

    我可以从 firebase 更改数据库吗？

    可以，但您需要更改 API 方法，因为目前 API 是根据 firebase 编写的。

    转到utils/apis文件夹，你会找到blogApi和subscribeApi，只需根据你的数据库更改它们。

    如果你想要你最喜欢的数据库的存储库，请在评论部分告诉我。

    我可以更改 UI 库吗？

    是的，一旦您对存储库进行编辑并扩展到您可以的任何范围，您就可以将存储库归您所有。

    您可以添加 Material UI 或 Chakra UI 或任何您想要的内容，并相应地替换所有 UI 组件，例如 Navbar、Button 和 Inputs。

    如果您再次想要 Material UI 或 Chakra UI 的相同存储库，只需添加评论即可，我会制作一个。

    管理员如何工作？

    如何管理存储库上的订阅？

    在 firebase 数据库中，EmailSubscribers 是集合名称，您可以在 MongoDB 或 SQL 中创建包含所有电子邮件订阅者的相同集合。
    存储库的布局是什么？

    • 我们有一个包裹存储库根目录的 Body
    • 正文包含位于底部的页脚
    • 最后，正文包含子项或内容
    • 页脚有一个订阅组件
    • 导航栏包含带有订阅按钮的黑白主题切换

    您可以将相同的存储库部署到您自己的域吗？

    是的你可以。 您可以根据需要更改网站的整个 UI 和架构。 您也可以更改数据库，并且可以使用其他 UI 库或样式库。

    使用这个存储库做任何你想做的事，这是你的，你有完全的控制权。



原文:

Let's assume you have one full-stack repository containing the application and the dashboard/backend to connect the application to the database.

I mean a complete full-stack repository to develop scalable products.

All you need is to clone the repository run a couple of commands and your full-fledged product is ready. 

Let me explain with the chart added below. This is what the repository does

Application is the frontend part of the website and admin is the backend part of the website.

What exactly you have to do is explained in the user flow. You just clone the repository run a couple of commands, open the admin write page and push the content and your blog website with content is ready to deploy.

This is the entire repository.

  • Manage your content in one place
  • Manage the UI of the website in one place
  • Manage subscribers and business in one place

Get the repository by clicking here

What is this repository?

This is a blog starter kit or blog start full-stack repository that helps developers to create and manage their content website including backend and front. 

This repository contains the application which is at the front end of the website and the admin which is at the backend of the website. 

What are Application and Admin in the repository?

Application is the look of the website and Admin is where the developer will manage the content of the website. 

The admin part includes the following-

  • Blogs page to Edit/Delete and list all the articles from the database(Firebase)
  • Write a page that contains an Editor to write blogs and save them in the database

How to use the repository?

  • Clone the repository
  • Add the Firebase database configurations in the next.config.jsfile, you will get the firebase config from Firebase console.
  • Run yarn and yarn run dev command
  • Open localhost:3001/admin/write to write the blog
  • Post the blog by adding a banner image
  • Deploy the website

Your content website is ready.

Why this repository?

Creating a blog website is not so easy and how you will scale is also a task, such as how to write content, how to save content and so on. 

A lot of things have to take care and this repository will solve this problem.

Get your blogging website ready instantly, and deploy it to your own domain.

None of the other no-code tools is providing you with the codebase or complete control of your own website and this repository did that.

What you will get in the repository?

  • Full stack repository of your own blog website
  • Admin panel to write and manage articles
  • Manage subscribers and grow your audience using the admin panel

How to change the UI of the website

Currently, the components folder in the root directory contains the home page and blog route.
If you want to change the UI of the home and blog pages, simply go to their respective index.jsx page and edit it accordingly.

Architecture

  • components contain the route pages 
  • pages contain the routes
  • public contains the static files
  • utils contain the config files for the database, themes and APIs
  • modules contain the reuse codebases like Navbar, Body and Subscribe

Tech stack

  • Next JS
  • React JS
  • Tailwind CSS
  • Firebase (Database)
  • React Icons (for icons)
  • React Query (data caching and fetching)
  • Editor JS (for blog editor)

How backend is connected to the front?

Firebase is the database and utils/firebase.js contains the connectivity whereas utils/api contains the APIs to perform CRUD operations.

Can I change the database from firebase?

Yes, you can but you need to change the API methods because currently the APIs are written according to firebase. 

Go to the utils/apis folder and you will find blogApi and subscribeApi, simply change them according to your database.

If you want the repository with your favourite database please let me know in the comment section.

Can I change the UI library?

Yes, you can the repository is yours once you get the repository edit and extend to whatever extent you can.

You can add Material UI or Chakra UI or whatever you want and replace all the UI components such as Navbar, Button, and Inputs correspondingly. 

If you again want the same repository for Material UI or Chakra UI just add in the comment and I'll make the one.

How does the Admin work?

Admin is another web page, understand it like a CMS that will help the developer to view/write/delete articles using the editor. 

How to manage subscriptions on the repository?

In the firebase database, EmailSubscribers is the collection name, you can create the same collection in MongoDB or SQL containing all the email subscribers. 
The subscribeApi contains the logic of how the user emails are added to the database. 

What is the layout of the repository?

  • We have a Body wrapping the root of the repository
  • The Body contains a Navbar stick to the top
  • The body contains a Footer that is at the bottom
  • Lastly, the body contains the children or content
  • The Footer has a subscribe component 
  • The Navbar contains a dark and white theme toggle with subscribe button 

Can you deploy the same repository to your own domain?

Yes, you can.  You can change the entire UI, and architecture of the website according to your need.  You can change the database also, and you can use other UI libraries or styling libraries. 

Do whatever you want using this repository this is yours and you have complete control.

item.title: 僵尸枪战 PICO-8 游戏 | Zombie Gun War PICO-8 Game
item.description:
一之濑贵根

发表于 3 月 1 日

僵尸枪战

控件

  • 向上箭头键：将菜单移至上方
  • 向下箭头键：将菜单移动到下方
  • 左箭头键：向左移动
  • 右箭头键：向右移动
  • 描述

    用这个游戏测试你的反应！ 与电脑战斗，射击你的火球，或者躲避电脑的火球。 无论如何，只是想赢过电脑。

    这个游戏的规则很简单。 你可以向左或向右移动，然后用“z”键或“O”键发射火球。

    我使用 PICO-8 创建了这个游戏。 幻想游戏机启发了 80 年代的游戏机。

    这个游戏有3个难点

    • 简单：电脑会随机发射火球。
    • 中：闪避阈值和移动响应较高。
    • 硬：闪避阈值和移动响应要高得多。

一旦暂停，takaneichinose 将无法发表评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被解除。

一旦解除暂停，takaneichinose 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，takaneichinose 的所有帖子都将隐藏起来，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 takaneichinose 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

笔记：

感谢您维护 DEV 社区的安全。 您可以通过以下方式标记 takaneichinose：

降低 takaneichinose 发布的所有帖子的可见度

报告其他不当行为

取消标记 takaneichinose 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

Takane Ichinose

Posted on Mar 1

takaneichinose.itch.io/zombie-gun-war

Zombie Gun War

Controls

  • Up arrow key: Move menu to above
  • Down arrow key: Move menu to below
  • Left arrow key: Move left
  • Right arrow key: Move right
  • Z: The 'O' button (Select from menu, or shoot fireball)

Description

Test your reflexes with this game! Fight with the computer, shoot your fire ball, or dodge the computer's fire ball. Anyway, just try to win against the computer.

The rule of this game is simple. You may just move left, or right, then shoot fireball with 'z' key or 'O' button.

I created this game using PICO-8. A fantasy console inspired the game console in the 80s.

There are 3 difficulties in this game

  • Easy: The computer will shoot fireball randomly.
  • Medium: The dodge threshold and move response is higher.
  • Hard: The dodge threshold and move response is much higher.

Pubudu Jayawardana - Feb 24

Once suspended, takaneichinose will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

Once unsuspended, takaneichinose will be able to comment and publish posts again.

Once unpublished, all posts by takaneichinose will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

If takaneichinose is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

Note:

Thanks for keeping DEV Community safe. Here is what you can do to flag takaneichinose:

Make all posts by takaneichinose less visible

takaneichinose consistently posts content that violates DEV Community's code of conduct because it is harassing, offensive or spammy.

Report other inappropriate conduct

Unflagging takaneichinose will restore default visibility to their posts.
